title: allium moly var. stramineum
intro: Allium moly var. stramineum, also known as Striped Honey Garlic, is a perennial plant within the Allium genus, characterized by its golden-yellow, striped foliage and delicate white flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Striped Honey Garlic include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and can also be used in cooking, with its mild garlic flavor and fragrance.
